caption: A video game depicting an American football game takes place on a green grass field marked with white yard lines. In the initial frames, a player in a white jersey and helmet is highlighted by a yellow circle on a red and gold end zone, with defenders in black jerseys nearby. One player is identified by the name "Smith." As the perspective shifts to a wide shot of the stadium, filled with spectators, a scoreboard displays "2nd & 6," "EXO," and a clock at "2:33 20." Other players in white and black jerseys are scattered across the field. The final frames show a close-up of a player in a white jersey numbered "24" and a small inset video of a man with blonde hair reacting. On-screen text in the bottom corner reads "UNDER PRESSURE" and "INACCURATE BULLET PAS." A banner in the background mentions "COMMANDERS."
